posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Asbestos Workers, Local Union #91
posting.locationSummary: Peekskill, NY area; job sites in Dutchess, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, and Westchester counties
posting.applicationSummary: Get applications in person at Asbestos Workers, Local Union #91 in Briarcliff Manor during the recruitment period; completed applications must be received by July 22, 2026 at 4:00 p.m.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Asbestos Workers, Local Union #91, 59 Sunset Drive, Suite 102A, Briarcliff Manor, NY 10510
posting.applicationHours: Monday through Friday, 12:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 50 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis; recruitment runs for 10 business days or until 50 applications have been issued, whichever comes first.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites in Dutchess, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, and Westchester counties.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take a medical exam, including random drug screening, during the probationary period. The sponsor pays the cost of the medical exam and drug testing.
posting.classRequirement: Must purchase hand tools for required classes at the approved school and job sites, and must purchase required text materials for classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
Must take a medical exam, including random drug screening, during the probationary period. Cost of the medical exam and drug testing will be at the expense of the sponsor.
Must attest in writing on the employment application that they are physically able to perform the work of the trade.

Must pass an agility test, which may include working an 8-hour day continually on their feet; lifting and carrying weights in excess of 50 lbs. for extended periods; working in restrictive or confined spaces; working at heights that may exceed 20 feet; working in adverse weather conditions and in unheated buildings; and carrying a 12-foot ladder for a distance of 20 feet and setting it up.
Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites in Dutchess, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, and Westchester counties.
Must purchase hand tools for use in required classes at the approved school and job sites as required. Tools will cost approximately $50.
Must purchase text materials for use in required classes at the approved school as required. Text materials will cost approximately $50.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalency, pass a physical/agility review and medical/drug screening, and have reliable transportation plus required tools and texts.
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact Asbestos Workers, Local Union #91 at (914) 788-0500.
